---
title: "progress-report-ishan-nichols "
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-29"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(janitor)
library(Lahman)

website <- read_html("https://www.baseball-reference.com/awards/hof_2026.shtml")

df <- website %>% html_element("#hof_BBWAA") %>% html_table() 

head(df)

df <- df %>% row_to_names(1) %>% clean_names 

df <- df %>% select(1:10)


```
```{r}
df %>% mutate(votes = as.numeric(votes), percent_vote = as.numeric(str_remove(percent_vote, "%")), yo_b = as.numeric(str_remove(yo_b, "st|th|rd|nd")), ho_fm = as.numeric(ho_fm), ho_fs = as.numeric(ho_fs),yrs = as.numeric(yrs))


```


```{r}
hof <- Lahman::HallOfFame

hof
```
